page_title: List of Survey Missions (Attack on Titan Game)
text:
Survey Missions are optional missions in Attack on Titan.

General Information

Survey Missions operate in much the same way as the regular missions in Attack Mode. The player is graded on performance and Dire Subjugation Targets, including Bizarre Titan variants, can be unlocked by fulfilling a set of criteria during the mission itself. As with regular Attack Mode missions, difficulty is represented by a number of stars (☆) ranging from 1 to 10. True Attack Mode is also available for Survey Missions.

Unlike Attack Mode, the player is free to play as any character they have unlocked, even the first time through, and Survey Missions can also be played with multiple people via online multi-player.

They are grouped by region and new regions unlock as the majority of missions in previous regions are completed. It is necessary to complete 80% of the missions in the first five regions to unlock all five epilogue missions in Attack Mode. There are six regions in all.

Completing Survey Missions will also unlock character models, audio clips, and speaking portraits in the Muster Roll.

Some crafting items will only appear as Survey Mission rewards.

List of Survey Missions

Southern Region 1st Survey
